title: Watermelon GUI
description: Most of the GUI is now watermelon, that includes icons, inventories, villagers ect.
body:
WATERMELON GUI

This resource pack changes general look of the GUI in Minecraft. That means your inventory, hotbar, and interactive blocks GUI's are now watermelon themed (Bosses health bars and achievements are not changed). 
So it's definitely for all the watermelon fans that are tired of the dull gray GUI of Minecraft. 

First pack is compatible for 1.18 and 1.17 versions of the game. (Actually any version that uses same GUI textures as 1.18) 

It doesn't require Optifine to work. 




If there are any missing textures, stray pixels ect. feel free to message me. 

Enjoy your new watermelon looks ;p
